rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PHILIP CHONG-U KIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the following issue-->since distribution is requested to the personal representative of the sister state and petitioner cannot state the domiciliary estate is insolvent, this court must make a determination that such distribution is in the best interest of the estate or interested persons. Hearing notes will be sent Monday morning. No proposed order was available for review.
